papers.title: Ideal crop plant architecture is mediated by tassels replace upper ears1, a BTB/POZ ankyrin repeat gene directly targeted by TEOSINTE BRANCHED1
papers.authors: Dong Z, Li W, Unger-Wallace E, Yang J, Vollbrecht E, Chuck G

edges.ev: IDS1 is targeted by the MIR172 microRNA encoded by the tasselseed4 (ts4) gene
SID1 is also targeted by other members of the MIR172 family
IDS1 and SID1 function to repress indeterminate lateral branch meristem fates
IDS1 and SID1 both function to control spikelet meristem determinacy
SID1 and IDS1 repress AGAMOUS-like MADS-box transcription factors within the lateral organs of the spikelet
SID1 and IDS1 repress AGAMOUS-like MADS-box transcription factors
Increased expression of ids1/Ts6 in two maize mutants increased spikelet pair meristem numbers and then enhanced kernel row numbers
ids1/Ts6 is involved in multiple pathways regulating spikelet pair meristem development, involving fea3, fea4 and ra3
ids1/Ts6 regulates ra3
KRN2 interacts with DUF1644 to negatively regulate grain number; KRN2 KO increased grain yield by ~10%
KRN2 interacts with a gene of unknown function, DUF1644
KRN2-DUF1644 complex negatively regulates grain number
The 1.2-Kb PAV acts as enhancer 60 Kb downstream of UB3 regulating UB3 expression
KRN in these 38 inbred lines was negatively correlated with the expression level of UB3 (r=-0.35)
UB2, UB3 function to restrict initiation of lateral primordia, thus allowing cell renewal within the central domain of the meristem
UB2 and UB3 limit the rate of cell differentiation to the lateral domains of meristems
UB2, UB3, and TSH4 function as redundant factors that limit the rate of cell differentiation
All three SBP genes are targets of miR156
All three SBP genes are targets of miR156
All three SBP genes are targets of miR156
Loss of KNOTTED1 expression in residual inflorescence meristems in ub2;ub3 mutants
Loss of KN1 expression in ub2 ub3 mutant meristems
Tru1 is a direct target of TB1 and is overexpressed in modern maize
GT1 is induced by TB1 and required to suppress lateral branching
grassy tillers1 promotes apical dominance; gt1 mutants have increased tillers
teosinte branched1 harbors a region that behaves as an enhancer with KN1-binding motifs
Ancient branching program through GT1 recruited to suppress carpel development
ub2;ub3 double mutants show doubled ear kernel row numbers

perturbations.ev: ids1 mutant spikelets become indeterminate producing 3-10 florets; distichous initiation
sid1 single mutants show spikelet meristem defects
Double mutant tassels had fewer branches and initiated a maximum of four rows vs seven to eight rows in wild-type female inflorescences
Increased expression of ids1/Ts6 enhanced kernel row numbers
Ts6 dominant mutation alters miR172 binding leading to IDS1 derepression
Knockout of KRN2 in maize increased grain yield by ~10%
Knockout of OsKRN2 in rice increased grain yield by ~8%
H21NX531 segment (absence allele) displayed higher KRN (more than 13 rows) vs H21 (11.8 rows)
ub3 single mutant reduces tassel branches
ub2 single mutant reduces tassel branches
ub2;ub3 double mutants show doubled ear kernel row numbers; fasciated ear tips
triple mutants completely lacked tassel branches; widespread derepression
tb1 mutants revert to highly branched ancestral state with axillary branches replacing ears
tru1 mutation causes phenotypes similar to tb1; long axillary branches tipped by tassels replace ear primordia
gt1 has increased tillers but does not directly modify kernel row number in main ear
